title: Support - App, user is logged out, correct data
scenario: Verify that after a mobile user is logged out from the tenant, the Support/App card shows tenant name, tenant id, and user id as None, App ID unchanged, and Last connection as unknown.
steps: 1. Log in as a mobile user to the tenant.
2. Note the current values displayed on the Support/App card (Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last connection).
3. Log out the mobile user from the tenant.
4. Observe the Support/App card after logout.
expected: After logout: Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID should display as None. App ID should remain the same as when the user was logged in. Last connection should show as unknown.
